examples.title: Unit Testing Example
examples.description: An example of a unit test for a simple calculator function.
examples.code:
FUNCTION add(x, y)
  RETURN x + y
END FUNCTION

TEST CASE: add(2, 3) = 5
examples.explanation: This example shows a simple unit test for a calculator function.
